details.test: Task 1: Book highest-rated 60-min Denver coach under $120
Task 2: Add cheapest qualifying 3-month matchmaking plan to cart
Task 3: Create dating profile for Alex with coaching & matchmaking enabled
Task 4: Register for one speed dating and one workshop event in Seattle
Task 5: Save three short first-date advice articles
Task 6: Add cheapest qualifying 4-session coaching bundle to cart
Task 7: Create "Potential Matchmakers" list and add three matchmakers
Task 8: Configure notifications to 2 email suggestions/week and 24-hour coaching reminders
Task 9: Buy $150 date coaching gift card with custom message
